titleStmt.title: SII 40.4: original edition by K. Munirathnam
No. 4. (A.R. No. B. 356 of 1929.) Tiruppalaivanam, Ponneri Taluk Chingleput District, Tamil Nadu.

summary.p: Round the belt of the central shrine in the Tirruppālēśvara temple.
This is dated Śaka 1601 (expired), Siddhārthi, Kārttīka 15.

Records the gift of land and money for providing the midday offerings and conducting worship to the god Pālēśvarasvāmi by the people of the nāḍu, dēśam and the merchants including the Kaikkōḷa-sale of the village, as requested by the priest Rāmadāsu of the temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p: svasti śrī vijayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakavarṣaṁbbulu 1601 cenana piṁmmaṭanagu śiddārthi saṁvaccaraṁ kārtika māsaṁ 15 . nāḍu śrīmadakhilāṁḍakōṭibrahmāṁḍanāyaku layina śrī tirupālēśvarasvāmiki nāḍuṟudēśaṁvāruṁnnu kaikoḷa sālevāragāṁḍlavāru modalaina vartakulu vrāśi yiccina mukhyadāna śāsanakramaṁ svāmiki pratidinaṁ madyāhnakālamaṁddu Abhiṣēka naivēdya dīpārādhnakaiṁkarya nayi vutsavaṁlō saptami Ārabhya 37 dinālu vubhayamunnu śukravāraṁ tōraṇadīpālunnu naḍpiṁcavalenu yiṁdku mukhmā(khyā)dāyaṁ kaṭṭaḍa śāyavalenani sāḷāpaṁtulu rāmadāsu mātō telpukoneganamemu Aṁdaramunu sammatiṁci majivātakā meṭla sātu mākhāṇaṁlō sunnapu guṁṭanaṁ vuppaḷāṁnunnu makhama kaṭṭaḍaceśina vivaraṁ Aynisuṁkapadi rūkhanū Aḷālagona 1 lekhakaikoḷa sātavāru sthalaṁlōnasēna vinaṁ lekhanū yī bo . makhama kaṭṭaḍa cestimi ganuka yī malipālannisāḷo paṁtula rāmadāsu Ācaṁdrārkasthāyigānu paṁcagalavāraṁ yī co . rāmadāsu yī nāmakhamana japiṁcakapōyinā tama pūrrvikulayna peddalaku drōhaṁ ceśina pāpāna vāraṇāsilō brahmahatya śrī hatya cēśina pāpāna pōgalavāraṁ (yiccina) vrāsiyiccina makha dāna śāsanaṁ .
Digital edition of SII 40.4 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
